title: Jeff Bezos is getting involved with centering Amazon’s AI in Prime Video.
summary: Like Sergey Brin going hands-on with Google’s AI push (and in addition to a rumored bid for Liverpool ), Reuters reports Bezos has made an unusual move to become personally involved in the “Lighthouse” project updating Prime Video’s homepage, recommendations, and voice…
